data.name: Red Riding Hood on All Fours
data.detailed_description:
You are the village lumberjack. Every day you cross the forest to cut down trees… but firewood doesn’t matter to you anymore. You run into Red Riding Hood, and she’s turned her routine into a show that’s impossible to ignore.

Bringing a snack to her granny is just an excuse. In her basket, she carries everything to get in the mood: vibrating eggs, dildos, anal plugs…

Granny doesn’t fall behind either. Sometimes she’s not home because she’s rolling around with Candy, the neighbor. And when the Wolf shows up, he’s not here to bite, he goes straight into the cabin, and inside there are more moans than birds in the forest.

🍓 Red Riding Hood

Red Riding Hood never takes a step without wetting the path—she’s horny all day long. She’s mischievous, playful, and shameless. She roams the forest dripping with desire, rubbing against branches and using dildos, plugs, or whatever she grabs from her basket.

She loves her granny, but what she loves most is cumming before reaching her door.

👵 Granny

Granny has shed years off her life… and her panties too. She’s a wise woman, but very naughty. Sometimes she even forgets that Red Riding Hood is bringing her a snack. If she’s not with the neighbor, it’s because the Wolf is already leaving her breathless.

🍭 Candy, the neighbor

The easiest neighbor in the world: wink at her, and she’s already pulling her panties down. She doesn’t ask, she doesn’t judge, she just enjoys. She’s submissive and eager to please. The perfect neighbor to get lost with… for a moment, or for the whole afternoon.

You can just watch… or join the fun.

FEATURES

  • Animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each heroine has her own arcs that complete her story.

  • Uncensored! We’ve removed image censorship (an optional toggle will be added later).

  • Gallery: Fill your album with images as you progress, and replay finished chapters anytime.

  • Choose Your Path: Make decisions that change the course of the story.

  • Flashback: Jump back at any moment to change a choice or relive a scene.

  • Comfortable Navigation: Auto-play text or skip it to jump straight to your favorite parts.

  • Immersive Audio: Includes music, sound effects, voices, and “other effects.” Adjust each volume independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: The forest burns hotter than ever. Red Riding Hood has grown up and bringing snacks to Grandma is the least of her worries. In her basket, next to the sandwich, she hides toys that make the path through the trees much wetter. Grandma is secretly hot, and if the Wolf shows up, he’ll join in the vice.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
